title: Atomic's Space Expansion
description: A simple building blocks pack for rockets, spacecraft, space stations and more.
body:
(Works standalone, but meant to be used with mods like Valkyrien Skies 2 and Create. Best used with Copycats+ for Create) A simple building blocks pack for rockets, spacecraft, space stations and more.

Mod content:

- Insulating foam blocks in all 16 dye colors (and an item to make them craftable)
- MLI foil blocks in gold, silver, and copper variants (gold and copper made by mixing silver MLI foil with yellow and orange dye)
- A solar array block
- A brushed metal block
- A shiny metal block
- A shiny metal window
- Black and white cover panels (with seamless variants)
- Black and white ribbed cover panels
- Green ribbed panels that you can use as engine mounts
- Radiator panels that you can put on spacecraft

All craftable! See gallery for crafting recipes.

I'm no longer working on this mod because I have lost interest in it, im more interested in other space stuff
